images.prompt: Premium editorial illustration, high-end tech magazine style: a glowing cream network schematic displayed on a confident control screen, while the physical server cabling it claims to represent has visibly drifted out of alignment beneath it — one red cable slipped loose that the screen doesn't show. The gap between a confident model and a drifted reality. Deep dark navy (#161a45) dominant palette, soft cream (#F4EFE3) schematic and highlights, thin red (#eb2027) accent on the undetected drift — no green, no purple, no rainbow palettes. Cinematic moody lighting, minimalist composition.
